comment.body:
also DISCORD
I see a lot of times asking about discord, (and there were some plp unsubscribed only bcs i didn't make discord server)
I want to everybody to remember that i didn't promise discord ever, since i've been first asked about making a service out of twitter. 
I have some good reasons for that.
1) I have a competitive agreement with a company I helped earlier, and they also have discord. And i’m not breaking the contract, not even in secret.
2) it would require to hire plp for moderation, that would be extra money, so the sub fees should go up, and extra work to check their work, and I really don't have the capacity for that. 
While I know discord is more comfortable, and many plp are more used to that than substack + many of you probably have lot of other memberships and would like to be everything in once tab, i just can't do it. 
My original plan was btw to post daily analysis and educational posts only. You can see my struggle with live trading signals. And i know that one cna automatize it via API, but remember the first point. 
So yeah, this is what I can offer.
